joinpointR 1.0.0
  • Reference
  • Articles

  • Changelog

Summary Tables for Joinpoint Regression Models

Source: R/summary_jp.R
summary_jp.Rd

Generates summary tables for one or more joinpoint regression models, including the number of joinpoints (JP), time periods, Annual Percent Change (APC) with 95% confidence intervals, and Average Annual Percent Change (AAPC) with statistical significance.

summary_jp(mods, digits = 1, dec = c(".", ","))

Arguments

mods

A list of models returned by model_jp().

digits

Integer. Number of decimal places used to display the results.

dec

Character. Decimal separator to use (e.g. "." or ",").

Value

A tibble with one row per segment containing the grouping variable(s), number of joinpoints (JP), time period(s), APC and its 95% confidence interval, and AAPC with significance stars.

Author

Tamara Ricardo

Examples

# Load example data
data(hiv_data)

# Fit joinpoint models
mods <- model_jp(
  data = hiv_data,
  value = hiv_rate,
  time = year,
  group = "region"
)
#> Model: Central | Joinpoint(s): 2019
#> Model: East | Joinpoint(s): 2019
#> Model: North | Joinpoint(s): 2019
#> Model: South | Joinpoint(s): 2019
#> Model: West | Joinpoint(s): 2019

# Summarize models
summary_jp(mods, digits = 1, dec = ".")
#> # A tibble: 10 × 7
#>    group      jp period    APC   CI_low CI_upp AAPC   
#>    <chr>   <int> <chr>     <chr> <chr>  <chr>  <chr>  
#>  1 Central     1 2010-2019 -4.6% -5.4%  -3.8%  -1.6% *
#>  2 Central     1 2019-2025 3.2%  1.3%   5.1%   NA     
#>  3 East        1 2010-2019 -6.4% -7.3%  -5.5%  -3.2% *
#>  4 East        1 2019-2025 2.6%  0.6%   4.7%   NA     
#>  5 North       1 2010-2019 -5.5% -6.3%  -4.7%  -1.8% *
#>  6 North       1 2019-2025 4.5%  2.5%   6.4%   NA     
#>  7 South       1 2010-2019 3.0%  2.0%   4.1%   0.2%   
#>  8 South       1 2019-2025 -3.8% -5.2%  -2.3%  NA     
#>  9 West        1 2010-2019 2.0%  1.1%   2.9%   -0.9% *
#> 10 West        1 2019-2025 -5.3% -7.1%  -3.5%  NA
